metadata.description: Web development skill track with prerequisite ordering, colored by topic area

nodes.label: HTML Elements
nodes.description: Core HTML tags: headings, paragraphs, links, images, lists, divs, spans. Document structure with head and body.

nodes.label: HTML Forms
nodes.description: Form elements: input types, textareas, selects, checkboxes, radio buttons. Form submission, action, and method attributes.

nodes.label: Semantic HTML
nodes.description: Semantic elements: header, nav, main, article, section, aside, footer. Importance for accessibility and SEO.

nodes.label: Tables & Media
nodes.description: HTML tables for tabular data. Embedding media: audio, video, iframe. Picture element and srcset for responsive images.

nodes.label: CSS Selectors
nodes.description: CSS selector types: element, class, ID, attribute, pseudo-class, pseudo-element. Specificity rules and the cascade.

nodes.label: CSS Box Model
nodes.description: Content, padding, border, margin. Box-sizing property. Display types: block, inline, inline-block. Overflow handling.

nodes.label: CSS Typography
nodes.description: Font properties, web fonts, Google Fonts. Text alignment, spacing, decoration. Line height and readability best practices.

nodes.label: Colors & Backgrounds
nodes.description: Color formats: hex, rgb, hsl. Background images, gradients, and shorthand. CSS custom properties (variables) for theming.

nodes.label: CSS Flexbox
nodes.description: Flex container and items. Main axis and cross axis. Justify-content, align-items, flex-wrap, gap. Common layout patterns.

nodes.label: CSS Grid
nodes.description: Grid container, rows, columns, template areas. Fr units, minmax, auto-fit/auto-fill. Two-dimensional layout patterns.

nodes.label: Responsive Design
nodes.description: Media queries, breakpoints, mobile-first approach. Fluid typography, relative units (em, rem, vw, vh). Responsive images.

nodes.label: CSS Transitions & Animations
nodes.description: CSS transitions for smooth property changes. Keyframe animations. Transform property: translate, rotate, scale. Performance considerations.

nodes.label: Variables & Data Types
nodes.description: let, const, var declarations. Primitive types: string, number, boolean, null, undefined, symbol. Type coercion and typeof.

nodes.label: Operators & Control Flow
nodes.description: Arithmetic, comparison, logical operators. If/else, switch, ternary. For, while, for...of, for...in loops. Break and continue.

nodes.label: Functions
nodes.description: Function declarations, expressions, arrow functions. Parameters, arguments, default values. Return values. Scope and closures.

nodes.label: Arrays & Array Methods
nodes.description: Creating and accessing arrays. Methods: push, pop, map, filter, reduce, find, forEach, sort, slice, splice. Spread operator.

nodes.label: Objects & JSON
nodes.description: Object literals, properties, methods. Dot and bracket notation. Destructuring. JSON.parse and JSON.stringify. Nested objects.

nodes.label: DOM Manipulation
nodes.description: Selecting elements: getElementById, querySelector. Creating, modifying, removing elements. InnerHTML vs textContent. DOM traversal.

nodes.label: Events & Event Handling
nodes.description: Event listeners, event object, event bubbling and capturing. Common events: click, submit, keydown, load. Event delegation.

nodes.label: ES6+ Features
nodes.description: Template literals, destructuring, spread/rest operators. Modules (import/export). Optional chaining, nullish coalescing. Map and Set.

nodes.label: Async/Await & Promises
nodes.description: Callbacks, callback hell. Promises: then, catch, finally. Async/await syntax. Promise.all, Promise.race. Error handling in async code.

nodes.label: Fetch API & HTTP
nodes.description: Fetch API for HTTP requests. GET, POST, PUT, DELETE methods. Headers, request/response objects. Handling JSON responses. CORS basics.

nodes.label: Classes & OOP
nodes.description: Class syntax, constructors, methods. Inheritance with extends. Getters and setters. Static methods. Prototypal inheritance under the hood.

nodes.label: Error Handling
nodes.description: Try/catch/finally blocks. Throwing custom errors. Error types. Debugging with console methods and browser DevTools.

nodes.label: Browser Storage
nodes.description: LocalStorage and sessionStorage APIs. Cookies: setting, reading, expiration. IndexedDB basics. Choosing the right storage mechanism.

nodes.label: React Components
nodes.description: Functional components, JSX syntax. Props for data passing. Component composition and reusability. Children prop. Fragment syntax.

nodes.label: React State
nodes.description: useState hook for local state. Immutable state updates. Lifting state up. Controlled vs uncontrolled components. Form state management.

nodes.label: React Hooks
nodes.description: useEffect for side effects. useRef for DOM references. useMemo and useCallback for optimization. Custom hooks for reusable logic.

nodes.label: Client-Side Routing
nodes.description: React Router: BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Link. Dynamic routes and URL parameters. Nested routes. Programmatic navigation.

nodes.label: React Context & State Management
nodes.description: Context API for global state. useContext hook. When to use context vs prop drilling. Introduction to state libraries (Redux, Zustand).

nodes.label: Data Fetching in React
nodes.description: Fetching data with useEffect. Loading and error states. React Query / SWR for server state. Suspense for data fetching.

nodes.label: React Forms & Validation
nodes.description: Controlled form inputs in React. Form libraries (React Hook Form, Formik). Client-side validation. Handling form submission.

nodes.label: Component Styling
nodes.description: CSS Modules, styled-components, Tailwind CSS. CSS-in-JS patterns. Theming and design tokens. Component library usage (MUI, shadcn).

nodes.label: Build Tools & Bundlers
nodes.description: npm/yarn package management. Vite, Webpack basics. Code splitting and lazy loading. Environment variables. Development vs production builds.

nodes.label: Next.js / Meta-Frameworks
nodes.description: Server-side rendering (SSR) vs static site generation (SSG). Next.js pages, API routes, and app router. File-based routing. ISR.

nodes.label: Node.js Fundamentals
nodes.description: Node.js runtime, event loop, non-blocking I/O. npm ecosystem. CommonJS vs ES modules. File system and path modules.

nodes.label: Express.js
nodes.description: Setting up an Express server. Routing, route parameters, query strings. Request and response objects. Serving static files.

nodes.label: Middleware
nodes.description: Express middleware pattern. Built-in middleware (json, urlencoded, static). Custom middleware. Error-handling middleware. Third-party middleware (cors, morgan).

nodes.label: REST API Design
nodes.description: REST principles, resource naming, HTTP methods. Status codes. Request/response formats. API versioning. CRUD operations.

nodes.label: Authentication & Authorization
nodes.description: Password hashing (bcrypt). JWT tokens: creation, verification, refresh. Session-based auth. OAuth 2.0 basics. Role-based access control.

nodes.label: Input Validation & Sanitization
nodes.description: Server-side validation with libraries (Joi, Zod, express-validator). Sanitizing user input. Preventing injection attacks.

nodes.label: File Uploads & Storage
nodes.description: Handling multipart form data (Multer). File validation and limits. Cloud storage (S3, Cloudinary). Streaming large files.

nodes.label: Environment & Configuration
nodes.description: Environment variables with dotenv. Configuration management. Secrets management. Development vs production settings.

nodes.label: SQL Fundamentals
nodes.description: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE queries. WHERE clauses, ordering, limiting. Data types. CREATE TABLE, ALTER TABLE. Primary keys.

nodes.label: SQL Joins & Relations
nodes.description: INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN, RIGHT JOIN. One-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-many relationships. Foreign keys. Junction tables.

nodes.label: Advanced SQL
nodes.description: Aggregations (GROUP BY, HAVING). Subqueries. Indexes for performance. Transactions and ACID properties. Views and stored procedures.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL
nodes.description: PostgreSQL setup and CLI (psql). Data types including JSONB. Full-text search. Connection pooling. PostgreSQL-specific features.

nodes.label: NoSQL & MongoDB
nodes.description: Document-based data model. Collections and documents. CRUD with MongoDB. Mongoose ODM: schemas, models, validation. Aggregation pipeline.

nodes.label: ORMs & Query Builders
nodes.description: Object-Relational Mapping with Prisma or Sequelize. Schema definition, migrations. Query builders (Knex). Type-safe database access.

nodes.label: Data Modeling
nodes.description: Entity-relationship diagrams. Normalization (1NF, 2NF, 3NF). Denormalization tradeoffs. Schema design patterns for web applications.

nodes.label: Database Migrations
nodes.description: Schema migration tools and workflows. Up and down migrations. Seeding data. Managing migrations in team environments.

nodes.label: Git Version Control
nodes.description: Git init, add, commit, push, pull. Branching and merging. Resolving merge conflicts. Git log and diff. .gitignore. GitHub workflow.

nodes.label: Git Collaboration
nodes.description: Pull requests and code review. Forking workflow. Branch naming conventions. Rebasing vs merging. Git stash. Cherry-pick.

nodes.label: CI/CD Pipelines
nodes.description: Continuous integration and deployment concepts. GitHub Actions workflows. Automated testing, linting, building. Deployment triggers.

nodes.label: Docker Basics
nodes.description: Containers vs VMs. Dockerfile: FROM, COPY, RUN, CMD. Building images. Docker Compose for multi-service apps. Volumes and networking.

nodes.label: Cloud Hosting
nodes.description: Platform-as-a-Service (Vercel, Railway, Render). AWS/GCP/Azure basics. Serverless functions. Static site hosting. Environment configuration.

nodes.label: Domains & SSL
nodes.description: Domain registration and DNS configuration. A records, CNAME, nameservers. SSL/TLS certificates. HTTPS setup. Let's Encrypt.

nodes.label: Monitoring & Logging
nodes.description: Application monitoring (uptime, errors). Logging strategies and tools. Error tracking (Sentry). Performance monitoring. Alerting.

nodes.label: TypeScript
nodes.description: Type annotations, interfaces, type aliases. Generics. Union and intersection types. Type narrowing. TypeScript with React and Node.

nodes.label: Testing
nodes.description: Unit testing with Jest/Vitest. Integration testing. React Testing Library for component tests. Test-driven development basics. Mocking.

nodes.label: End-to-End Testing
nodes.description: E2E testing with Playwright or Cypress. Test scenarios and user flows. Visual regression testing. CI integration for E2E tests.

nodes.label: Web Performance
nodes.description: Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS). Lazy loading, code splitting. Image optimization. Caching strategies. Lighthouse audits. Bundle analysis.

nodes.label: Web Accessibility
nodes.description: WCAG guidelines. ARIA roles and attributes. Keyboard navigation. Screen reader compatibility. Color contrast. Focus management.

nodes.label: SEO Fundamentals
nodes.description: Meta tags, Open Graph, structured data. Sitemap and robots.txt. Semantic HTML for SEO. Page speed impact. Social media previews.

nodes.label: Progressive Web Apps
nodes.description: Service workers for offline support. Web app manifest. Push notifications. Caching strategies (Cache API). Installable web apps.

nodes.label: WebSockets & Real-Time
nodes.description: WebSocket protocol and API. Socket.IO for real-time communication. Server-Sent Events. Real-time app patterns: chat, notifications, live updates.

nodes.label: Web Security
nodes.description: XSS prevention, CSRF protection. Content Security Policy. HTTPS everywhere. Dependency vulnerability scanning. OWASP Top 10 awareness.

nodes.label: GraphQL
nodes.description: GraphQL schema, queries, mutations. Resolvers. Apollo Client and Server. GraphQL vs REST tradeoffs. Subscriptions for real-time data.

nodes.label: npm Scripts & Task Runners
nodes.description: Package.json scripts. Running dev servers, build tasks, and linting. npx for one-off commands. Workspaces and monorepos.

nodes.label: CSS Positioning
nodes.description: Position property: static, relative, absolute, fixed, sticky. Z-index and stacking context. Centering techniques. Float and clear.

nodes.label: Regular Expressions
nodes.description: Regex syntax and patterns. Character classes, quantifiers, anchors. String methods: match, replace, search, split. Regex testing tools.

nodes.label: Rate Limiting & Caching
nodes.description: API rate limiting strategies. In-memory caching with Redis. HTTP caching headers. CDN caching. Cache invalidation patterns.

nodes.label: Linting & Formatting
nodes.description: ESLint configuration and rules. Prettier for code formatting. Stylelint for CSS. Editor integration. Pre-commit hooks with Husky.

nodes.label: CSS Preprocessors
nodes.description: Sass/SCSS syntax: variables, nesting, mixins, functions. Partials and imports. PostCSS and autoprefixer. CSS-in-JS alternatives.

nodes.label: Iterators & Generators
nodes.description: Symbol.iterator protocol. Generator functions with yield. Async generators. Practical uses: lazy evaluation, infinite sequences, async iteration.

nodes.label: Web Components
nodes.description: Custom Elements API. Shadow DOM encapsulation. HTML templates and slots. Lit library. Framework-agnostic component sharing.

nodes.label: Browser Caching
nodes.description: HTTP cache headers: Cache-Control, ETag, Last-Modified. Service worker caching strategies. Cache busting with hashed filenames.

nodes.label: Design Systems
nodes.description: Building reusable component libraries. Design tokens. Storybook for component documentation. Atomic design methodology. Theming systems.

nodes.label: Error Boundaries & Monitoring
nodes.description: React error boundaries. Global error handling. Error tracking services (Sentry). Source maps for debugging production. User feedback on errors.

nodes.label: Redis & Caching Layer
nodes.description: Redis data structures. Session storage with Redis. Pub/sub messaging. Cache-aside pattern. TTL and eviction policies.
